raw_consumer_statement:
I PAYED OFF MY LAST BILL. But they say that they got bill late. I mailed it on time. Now whether mail is slow or accidents in mail is not my fault. So they charged me for late fees & keep sending bill for late fees. I did call accounting & tryed to resolved. Forgot day & time but did talk to a gentleman to resolve. I told him close my account. They have it recorded. I want to stop th from harrassing me for a Card i finished paying off. Appreciate your help. 
XXXX XXXX XXXX
